Okay, real talk: Baresi or Maldini? Who’s your GOAT in that legendary Milan defence? 🤯

Baresi was the undisputed libero architect, bossing the entire backline with an iron will. Maldini? Pure class and versatility, playing a mind-blowing 902 games for the Rossoneri! 5 UCLs for Paolo, 3 for Franco. But whose aura was stronger, whose impact more profound in their era? THAT's the debate!

#ACMilan #SerieA #FootballHistory

Sacchi's AC Milan wasn't just good, they redefined football! His 4-4-2, with its absurdly high defensive line and relentless zonal marking, made the pitch feel tiny. They compressed space like no team before. Pure tactical masterclass! #ACMilan #FootballTactics #History

Let's settle this for good: Ruud van Nistelrooy was a penalty box GOD. Pure, ruthless finisher. But Thierry Henry? He didn't just score goals, he redefined striker play. Goals from anywhere, assists for days, pure artistry. One was a poacher's dream, the other a complete attacking force. Who truly had the bigger impact on the Premier League's Golden Era?
